title: Run a change-approval review for a deploy
description: Verify a pending deploy carries valid, independent, change-bound approval before it proceeds.
body: Steps: 1. Identify the artifact/commit to deploy. 2. Locate its approval record and confirm the approver is not the author. 3. Confirm the approval references this exact artifact, not a prior one. 4. Confirm a linked authorized change request exists and predates the change. 5. Pass only if all hold; otherwise block and report which gate failed. Rollback point: the gate itself, before the deploy step runs. Validation: a self-approved or artifact-mismatched deploy is rejected, and the decision plus its evidence are recorded.
